title: High-Energy Astrophysics & Gamma-Ray Bursts

grb_prompt.formula: N(E) = A·(E/100keV)^α·exp(-E(2+α)/E_peak) for E<E_c; power law above
grb_prompt.why: Band function = broken power law + exponential cutoff = EML-2

variability.why: GRB light curve variability ~ exp(iωt): quasi-periodic oscillations = EML-3

spectrum_tensor_variability.result: Prompt emission = EML-∞ (cross-type: real spectral × oscillatory timing)

jet.why: BZ mechanism: Φ_BH ~ exp(iΩ_H·t): rotating black hole Faraday flux = EML-3

afterglow.formula: F_ν ~ t^{-α}·ν^{-β}: broken power law = EML-2

inspiral.why: Chirp signal h(t) ~ exp(iΦ(t)): EML-3 (oscillatory strain)

magnetar.why: B ~ 10^15 G: exp(μ·B/kT) magnetization in extreme field = EML-3 (Landau levels)

quasi_periodic_oscillations.formula: QPO ~ exp(iω_QPO·t): torsional Alfvén mode = EML-3

semiring_verdicts.new_finding: NS merger = two-level ring {2,3}: confirms Langlands Universality Conjecture in GW physics
